_comment: Facebook groups for auto-posting. Add GROUP_ID by visiting the group on Facebook and copying the numeric ID from the URL. Set active to false to pause a group without deleting it. post_sections controls which content types get shared to each group.

groups.name: Norfolk Farming
groups._note: Find group ID from the group URL on Facebook

_setup_instructions: 1. Search for each group on Facebook
2. Open the group and copy the numeric ID from the URL
3. Paste the ID into group_id above
4. Set active to true when ready
5. Your Page must be a member of the group before posting
6. Some groups require admin approval — check group rules first
IMPORTANT: Only post to groups where farming content is welcome.
Spamming irrelevant groups will get your page reported.

global_settings._delay_comment: Wait this long between each group post to avoid rate limiting
global_settings._verified_comment: Only posts that passed Gate 1 and Gate 2 get shared to groups
global_settings._high_value_comment: Only posts flagged as high-value by the generator get auto-shared to groups
